chapter_title: Denial of Renewal of License for Failure to Appear
text:
(a) An officer collecting a reimbursement fee under Section 706.006 (Payment of Reimbursement Fee) shall remit the money to the municipal or county treasurer, as applicable.

(b) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1352 (S.B. 346 ), Section 1.19(14), eff. January 1, 2020.

(c) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1352 (S.B. 346 ), Section 1.19(14), eff. January 1, 2020.

(d) The custodian of a municipal or county treasury shall deposit the money collected under Section 706.006 (Payment of Reimbursement Fee) to the credit of the general fund of the municipality or county for the purposes of Section 706.008 (Contract with Private Vendor; Compensation) .

(e) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1352 (S.B. 346 ), Section 1.19(14), eff. January 1, 2020.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 706. Denial of Renewal of License for Failure to Appear
##### § 706.007 — Disposition of Fees

(a) An officer collecting a reimbursement fee under Section 706.006 (Payment of Reimbursement Fee) shall remit the money to the municipal or county treasurer, as applicable.

(b) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1352 (S.B. 346 ), Section 1.19(14), eff. January 1, 2020.

(c) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1352 (S.B. 346 ), Section 1.19(14), eff. January 1, 2020.

(d) The custodian of a municipal or county treasury shall deposit the money collected under Section 706.006 (Payment of Reimbursement Fee) to the credit of the general fund of the municipality or county for the purposes of Section 706.008 (Contract with Private Vendor; Compensation) .

(e) Repealed by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1352 (S.B. 346 ), Section 1.19(14), eff. January 1, 2020.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1352 (S.B.346), Sec. 2.80, eff. January 1, 2020.*
